rulings.Case Title: CAROL ALHIMSI ET AL VS. NAIM JAMALI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 27, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF CAROL ALHIMSI, IBRAHIM KHADER's Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. Action settled. = (501/NJL)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder And Joinder In Defendant Steven R. Matulich'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 27, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT LARRY ODBERT's Joinder In Defendant Steven R. Matulich'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases DENIED. Larry Odbert was served with the motion to consolidate and has not filed timely objection or opposition. This joinder also fails to provide sufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 27, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT STEVEN MATULICH's Motion To Set Aside Order Consolidating Cases continued to January 5, 2017. Motion to consolidate was filed and served prior to Defendant's appearance in this action. Due to a clerical error, Motion to Consolidate did not appear in the Register of Actions for this case. Due process requires that Defendant be heard on this matter. Defendant's proposed opposition shall be considered. Plaintiff shall file a reply to Defendant's proposed opposition filed on November 28, 2016 no later than January 3, 2017. = (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ESTRELLA REYES DE JESUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion An Dmotion For Terminating Sanctions For Defendants Antonio Munoz, Martha Munoz, Yolanda Munoz, Daniel Soto; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; An Declaration Of Leslie M. Klott In Support Thereof; Proposed Order; And Proposed Judgment Thereon.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 27, 2016 line 6. PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Defendants Antonio Munoz, Martha Munoz, Yolanda Munoz, Daniel Soto GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendants' answers are stricken. Sanctions granted in the amount of $145.25 per defendant. Plaintiff may request entry of default and default judgement through the Clerk's office.= (501/NJL)
rulings.Judge: Judge Pro Tem: Noah J. Lebowitz

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS ATWOOD VS. JUSTIN BROCK GERBER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 27, 2016 line 4. DEFENDANT JUSTIN GERBER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice are sufficient. Defendant and his counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. = (501/NJL)
